sprint: Frame Look / Frame Style / Frame Variation Now Respect the Selected Place
task: A real, user-reported bug found hands-on testing Multiple Artwork Places Per Page: 'i selected first place and tried to give it round frame it was success. i selected second place tried to give it poloroid frame it applied to first place.' This was the exact, disclosed Place-1-only scope gap that feature's own ship note named and deferred for Frame Look/Frame Style/Artwork Presentation controls -- now closed. The RENDER side (renderer/slideRenderer.js) already fully supported a per-Place border/artwork override; the WRITE side never used it -- js/cardDesigner.js's Frame Look presets and every Frame Style slider/chip/toggle, plus js/workspaceBuilder.js's Artwork Presentation controls (Frame Variation swatches, Presentation/Frame/Lighting/Caption/Paper/Mat), always read/wrote Place 1's storage regardless of which Place was actually selected. Fixed by mirroring the exact per-Place convention the Fit/Fill/Scale/Offset controls already used successfully: _ensureBorder/_readBorder/_pruneBorder/_resetBorder/_applyFrameDesign gained an optional placeId parameter (omitted = byte-identical Place-1 path); _refreshBorder's hasImage gate was corrected to check the SELECTED Place, not always Place 1; workspaceBuilder.js's _ensureArtwork/_readArtwork gained the same optional placeId, driven by a new ctx.getPlaceId callback threaded through every ctx-building call site in cardDesigner.js. Verified via a new Playwright test reproducing the exact reported sequence end-to-end against a real Dual Holder Scene: Place 1 gets Rounded, Place 2 gets Polaroid, Place 1 is confirmed unchanged afterward (the exact bug, now passing); a Frame Style slider is confirmed isolated per-Place too. Full regression across the entire existing Creator/Builder/Card-Platform Playwright suite (24 scripts) and both goldenBuild.js suites passes unchanged, zero console errors. See CLAUDE.md's matching entry for the full account.
